name: Reviewer + Security disagree → debate runs → Quality Judge arbitrates → verdict ARBITRATED in debate_verdicts.jsonl
description: Drives loop to REVIEWER_CODE_AND_SECURITY, then invokes runDebate() from debate_protocol.js with mock role_invoker. Reviewer reports BLOCKER at routes/todos.js:42; security_auditor reports BLOCKER at server.js:15. Different BLOCKER locations cause _blockersAgree() to return false for all 3 COUNTER rounds (MAX_COUNTER_ROUNDS=3). quality_judge is invoked for ARBITRATE, producing verdict=ARBITRATED. debate_log has exactly 9 entries (2 PROPOSE + 6 COUNTER + 1 ARBITRATE). Verdict is persisted to debate_verdicts.jsonl at the v1.1.0 per-loop path. Loop continues to COMPLETE. No audit row added for debate (SUMMARY_WRITTEN not in VALID_TRANSITION_TYPES — OQ5 resolution). Plan §2 closure criterion 4.
